calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marylouise Allen, Executor, in propria persona via Court Call.
Siobhan Gallagher, Petitioner, in propria persona via Court Call.
Shelagh Gallagher is present in the courtroom.

Siobhan stated she sent her proposed order to the court by UPS with estimated delivery sometime this morning, that she had issues finding the will lodged by Marylouise, that the funeral has been paid for, that $5,000.00 cannot be returned without letters testamentary, and that there is money in Chase and Charles Schwab accounts. The Court noted that we do not have the courtesy copy of the petition. Siobhan stated she thought courtesy copies were not required if it was efiled. Marylouise stated there is no money in the Chase account, the Chase account had $0.00 balance as of 2019, there was a check issued to Siobhan Gallagher from the Schwab account that was not cashed so $340.00 is available, that there is less than $1,000.00 in the estate, that it doesn't make sense to take to probate, that it is an insolvent account, and that the petitioner has no standing. The Court noted that Siobhan did not address the examiner's notes.

The Fourth Amended Petition for Probate is off calendar. If petitioner wants to try again, she should do so with counsel.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
